message:
test(ctype): matrix-envelope harness + spec_reference fixture

Mirrors the iconv/dlfcn pattern for the ctype_ops conformance surface.

crates/frankenlibc-harness/tests/ctype_ops_conformance_test.rs
  * Adds the differential matrix-envelope decoder (same shape as the
    iconv_phase1 rollout): each case now decodes into
    `MatrixCaseEnvelope { kind, run: Option<DifferentialExecution>,
    error: Option<String> }` so cases can opt into host-parity
    differential execution vs. the installed libc.
  * Imports std::process::{Command, Stdio} for the subprocess
    invocation path (host isalpha/islower/tolower/… oracle).
  * FixtureFile struct gains a `#[serde(default)] spec_reference`
    field so failures surface the POSIX chapter reference in the
    failure diagnostic.

tests/conformance/fixtures/ctype_ops.json
  * Add `"spec_reference": "POSIX.1-2017 ctype.h, ISO C11 7.4"`
    at the top level, matching the iconv and dlfcn fixtures'
    metadata convention.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -3,6 +3,7 @@
   "family": "ctype",
   "captured_at": "2026-02-13T00:00:00Z",
   "description": "Character classification and conversion functions — POSIX.1-2017 / C11 ctype.h",
+  "spec_reference": "POSIX.1-2017 ctype.h, ISO C11 7.4",
   "cases": [
     {
       "name": "isalpha_uppercase_A",
